case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. CALEB JONES et al.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, JOSHUA $2,385.96 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,485.96, JOSHUA JONES AGREES TO BE ADDED AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT AND WAIVES SERVICE OF PROCESS. CONSENTING THAT JUDGMENT BE ENTERED AGAINST HIM, JOSHUA JONES. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST CALEB JONES IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: EVANS, NEIL C. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR CREDITORS SPECIALTY SERVICE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-14-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-14-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JOHN LEGASPI--COMMUNITY RELATIONS--PUBLIC INFO. OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CALEB JONES BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-14-2014 AT 10:00 AM.
